tasks.description: Array of task trace records reported since the previous progress update.

process.description: Workflow process name for the task.

submit.description: Timestamp when the task was submitted.

start.description: Timestamp when the task started running.

module.description: Array of module names associated with the task.

container.description: Container image used for the task.

script.description: Executed task script content or path.

scratch.description: Scratch directory used by the task.

queue.description: Executor queue used for the task.

cpus.description: Number of CPUs requested by the task.

memory.description: Amount of memory requested by the task.

disk.description: Amount of disk requested by the task.

executor.description: Nextflow executor used for the task.

machineType.description: Machine or instance type used to run the task.

cloudZone.description: Cloud zone used to run the task.

priceModel.description: Cloud pricing model used for the task.
priceModel.title: CloudPriceModel

errorAction.description: Nextflow error strategy action applied to the task.

exitStatus.description: Process exit status reported by the task runtime.

duration.description: Total recorded task duration in milliseconds.

nativeId.description: Native scheduler or executor job identifier.

pcpu.description: Observed CPU usage percentage for the task.

pmem.description: Observed memory usage percentage for the task.

rss.description: Resident memory usage for the task.

vmem.description: Virtual memory usage for the task.

peakRss.description: Peak resident memory usage for the task.

peakVmem.description: Peak virtual memory usage for the task.

rchar.description: Number of characters read by the task.

wchar.description: Number of characters written by the task.

syscr.description: Number of read-like system calls performed by the task.

syscw.description: Number of write-like system calls performed by the task.

readBytes.description: Number of bytes read from storage by the task.

writeBytes.description: Number of bytes written to storage by the task.

volCtxt.description: Number of voluntary context switches for the task.

invCtxt.description: Number of involuntary context switches for the task.

exit.description: Task exit code recorded by Nextflow.

taskId.description: Task numeric identifier reported by Nextflow.

dateCreated.description: Timestamp when the task record was created.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the task record was last updated.

pending.description: Number of tasks currently pending execution.

submitted.description: Number of tasks submitted to the executor or scheduler.

cached.description: Number of tasks satisfied from cache.

aborted.description: Number of tasks that were aborted.

stored.description: Number of tasks whose results were stored without execution.

ignored.description: Number of tasks ignored by the workflow logic.

retries.description: Number of task retries attempted so far.

loadCpus.description: Current aggregate CPU load across running tasks.

loadMemory.description: Current aggregate memory load across running tasks.

peakRunning.description: Highest number of concurrently running tasks observed so far.

peakCpus.description: Peak aggregate CPU load observed so far.

peakMemory.description: Peak aggregate memory load observed so far.

index.description: Stable order index for the process within the workflow summary.

pending.description: Number of pending tasks for this process.

submitted.description: Number of submitted tasks for this process.

running.description: Number of running tasks for this process.

succeeded.description: Number of successful tasks for this process.

cached.description: Number of cached tasks for this process.

failed.description: Number of failed tasks for this process.

aborted.description: Number of aborted tasks for this process.

stored.description: Number of stored tasks for this process.

ignored.description: Number of ignored tasks for this process.

retries.description: Number of retries for tasks in this process.

terminated.description: If `true`, this process has no more active work to report.

loadCpus.description: Current aggregate CPU load for this process.

loadMemory.description: Current aggregate memory load for this process.

peakRunning.description: Peak number of concurrently running tasks for this process.

peakCpus.description: Peak aggregate CPU load observed for this process.

peakMemory.description: Peak aggregate memory load observed for this process.

containers.description: Array of container metadata records reported for the workflow tasks.

requestId.description: Wave request identifier associated with this container resolution.

sourceImage.description: Original container image requested by the workflow.

targetImage.description: Resolved container image actually used to run the task.

buildId.description: Wave build identifier for the resolved container image.

scanId.description: Wave security scan identifier for the resolved container image.

mirrorId.description: Wave mirror identifier for the resolved container image.

cached.description: If `true`, the container image was served from cache rather than built again.

freeze.description: If `true`, the container image was resolved with freeze mode enabled.

requestTime.description: Timestamp when the container metadata was requested.
